case_title: PREMA THEKKEK et al VS. TIFFANI TREVETHAN et al

ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST KYLE THEKKEK, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-03-2011 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-18-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-25-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-17-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST PREMA THEKKEK, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-03-2011 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-18-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-03-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THEKKEK, KYLE

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-25-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-25-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-03-2011 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs are each sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (610)
